channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: A simple explainer on what quantum computing actually is, and why it is terrifying for bitcoin
item.description: Most simplifies the complex process of quantum computing as "it can be 0 and 1 at the same time." That is not an explanation for why it threatens Bitcoin. This is.

item.title: Polymarket odds of US invading Iran this year reach 63% after Trump's post
item.description: The President of the United States continues to give contradictory signals of escalating the war and winding it down within a few weeks.

item.title: Polymarket pulls controversial Iran rescue markets after intense backlash
item.description: Prediction markets face rising regulatory pressure, with congressional Democrats proposing legislation to ban contracts tied to elections, war and government actions.

item.title: Weekly Recap 1) Iran demands ships transiting through the Strait of Hormuz to pay fees in crypto or Chinese yuan. 2) US Department of Labor proposes rule to open $10 trillion 401k retirement plans to crypto and alternative investments. 3) $12 trillion Charles - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBLSXZhN2g5RnBkNWN5RVlzY2h4azJlS3ZuVWZEV0V5TFdCdDAxY3NzbUxOQ3JxWl9tbnhNMWdneXZuTjE0cjZkd1Y4M0lqZVc1c0FTNi1hTVdsN00xdGc1VXJB?oc=5" target="_blank">Weekly Recap 1) Iran demands ships…

item.title: Bitcoin and the US dollar have a 'symbiotic' relationship: BPI exec
item.description: Demand for either currency strengthens both in a reinforcing relationship, contrary to popular sentiment, Sam Lyman told Cointelegraph.

item.title: Bitcoin is now front-running the Fed rather than reacting to it. ETFs are the cause
item.description: Bitcoin's correlation with global central bank easing has turned strongly negative since 2024, suggesting BTC now leads rather than lags monetary policy signals.

item.title: AI is making crypto's security problem even worse, Ledger CTO warns
item.description: Ledger’s Charles Guillemet says artificial intelligence is making hacks cheaper and faster, forcing a rethink of how crypto systems stay secure.

item.title: Timeframes matter. Since Aug 2020, Bitcoin is the top-performing major asset and it’s not even close. Zoom out further and the gap only widens. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9KeTlfOVNRQ3pxVmlJa3JvUlBTcEhNWDY1UW1DeENYVGp1UDlHNGx1OHlHNFZqZWhrS0tsVWgtVk5OZ2hlZXFQSHR5VkZmQ21FcXkxUXpsbk9TdUk?oc=5" target="_blank">Timeframes matter. Since Aug 2020, Bitcoin …

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "₿ack to Work." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5PeTFhQ3V1cnl6aGpXeHE4dklheURaSGdvQlpwajlNME5MMHd5OVh2RVN4Yjg5blZQS1h5NXVRcVBQWDR6ZnlURTFXVDZTcGtPM1pJMkFhaGV5TGczSWhZT0RB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Drift says $270 million exploit was a six-month North Korean intelligence operation
item.description: Attackers posed as a trading firm, met Drift contributors in person across multiple countries, deposited $1 million of their own capital, and waited half a year before executing the drain CoinDesk detailed earlier this week.

item.title: Robert Kiyosaki recommends Bitcoin, gold as 1974 shift comes full circle
item.description: The Rich Dad Poor Dad author continues to back Bitcoin, gold and silver as alternatives to traditional money.

item.title: Ant Group’s blockchain arm unveils platform for AI agents to transact on crypto rails
item.description: Anvita includes tokenization services and a platform for agents to coordinate tasks and settle payments in real time using stablecoins.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady as sentiment hits worst levels since Iran war began
item.description: Social sentiment, on-chain data, and positioning metrics all hit extremes not seen since late February, even as institutional buying remains elevated.

item.title: New Bitcoin price lows 'matter of time' says trader with BTC stuck at $67K
item.description: Bitcoin added downside BTC price warnings as Binance order-book data showed multiple investor classes selling coins into the weekend.

item.title: Bitcoin Price on Easter 🐣 2012: $5 2013: $93 2014: $500 2015: $255 2016: $418 2017: $1,195 2018: $6,850 2019: $5,325 2020: $7,050 2021: $58,000 2022: $40,000 2023: $28,500 2024: $70,000 2025: $84,500 2026: $67,000 - x.com

item.title: This message was embedded in #Bitcoin's 666,666th block. - x.com

item.title: ‘Existential’ token problem seen as supply outpaces value creation: Blockworks exec
item.description: Blockworks' Michael Ippolito sees surge in token supply diluting returns, breaking the link between fundamentals and price while raising concerns about crypto’s long-term model.

item.title: Crypto Community on X Discusses Favorite Memecoins for Bu... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5zSzB1V1VvVXdTdnUzczI0WHZWdFcwRjlJc0ZaOWFkSmVfaW1QN3VzVXBXWXhkVk5TSGJ4Q3ZMNG5YNV8xTVRXOTJvN0hpempQbC00QkJtTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Community on X Discusses Favorite Memecoi…

item.title: Anthropic launches PAC amid tensions with Trump administration over AI policy
item.description: AI firm Anthropic forms an employee-funded PAC while facing questions over political balance and a growing dispute with the Pentagon over AI use.

item.title: Dragonfly just moved $2.12M MNT to Bybit. It was their first outflow from their known crypto wallets in 2 months, and their largest holding outside of BGB. Dragonfly now only holds $107.29M of BGB and $1.92M of other crypto. - x.com

item.title: Drift Protocol $280M exploit took 'months of deliberate preparation'
item.description: Drift Protocol said, with “medium-high confidence,” that the recent attack was carried out by the same actors responsible for the $58 million Radiant Capital hack in October 2024.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UPDATE: The UK Government's Bitcoin wallet has now lost around $3.5B since October 6, 2025. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1iWUpuZThraFlFS2ZFRFBiZmF2R2NYSG1JNEZRU3plVWtBZXlqYVNqdVdyYTJlUlMxclVReUN3b25xZVlHRExUUU1VdU4zYko2NklJd1I1RG5VODNWRVMxY2RyNUs?oc=5" target="_blank">🇬🇧 UPDATE: The UK Government'…

item.title: Bitcoin bearish social chatter reaches 5-week high: Santiment
item.description: Santiment said bearish Bitcoin comments on social media have climbed to a five-week high, which could signal a reversal sooner rather than later.

item.title: Bitcoin's $1.3 trillion security race: Key initiatives aimed at quantum-proofing the world's largest blockchain
item.description: Developers are considering ways to quantum-proof the world's oldest cryptocurrency as the threat of this computing moves beyond a hypothetical.

item.title: JUST IN: Probe into the $285 million Drift Protocol crypto hack found team members were approached at conferences by representatives tied to a North Korean-linked operation. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBBWERIaGxoSDBrU3JOakZIXzZDbS1UYjEtYkFBamZ3ZVFHSjVtZWFQeWJCS2kzWWUxbVFoMUZmNFN5ZVJ5a1NVeG5DWEFKTV9RMDNZMVFTQWxBNjllT0k3Uw?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Probe into the $285 million…

item.title: 🚨BITCOIN WHALES TURN MAJOR SELLERS Wallets holding 1,000–10,000 BTC have shifted from the market’s biggest buyers to its biggest sellers in one of the most aggressive distribution cycles on record, per CryptoQuant. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9fdTMycWd2THAwSVJGMGtIc2VETXlkUUp5VFhRSG9PSzFGTXYwZE56a3V5Z2QyZFlfWExyRHNBd05YM3lFc3JCZTByaU5laTB2UFVOT1VOY0o1bzhyMnVyQg?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨BITCOIN WHALES TURN MAJOR SELLERS …

item.title: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says Iranian government's ban backfired
item.description: Thousands of software developers are currently developing virtual private networks to circumvent Tehran's control of local internet access, Durov said.

item.title: Bitcoin tends to outperform gold and stocks after global shocks, Mercado Bitcoin finds
item.description: The study analyzed 60-day windows after economic or geopolitical shocks and found that Bitcoin posted stronger returns than gold and the S&P 500 in each period.

item.title: Jimmy Song explains why Bitcoin needs a 'conservative' node client
item.description: The Bitcoin advocate is the co-founder of ProductionReady, a non-profit initiative to fund open source development of BTC software and education.

item.title: Ex-UK Chancellor backs bitcoin as alternative to failing systems
item.description: Kwasi Kwarteng reflects on current UK market turmoil, fiscal “doom loop,” and his move into bitcoin with Stack BTC.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor says the four-year Bitcoin cycle is "dead." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE91RG8xV2pGWUVUNTNlZDFUUEpNQ19hNkVsTHg0SWtiYTU4dzJjZ052N2VFZnZ0eEpGM0pYMGNNNWZ2YTlBNU9lcjFod1o3VDh2OWxXd1hUdUpiV2NGWC1kTmZn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor says the f…

item.title: Digital asset treasuries must now earn their keep
item.description: For treasuries to do so and stay competitive, Kiernan unpacks three broad strategies that are emerging.

item.title: AI Giant Anthropic Files to Launch 'AnthroPAC' Amid Clash With Trump Administration
item.description: Claude developer Anthropic registered an employee-funded PAC amid a legal battle with the White House and rising election-year scrutiny of AI.

item.title: The "Ultimate Support" for Bitcoin $BTC is at $47,960. One of the most powerful tools for identifying a macro bottom is CVDD. It tracks when "Diamond Hands" finally pass their coins to new buyers, effectively "destroying" coin days to create a new price floor. • C - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1kbjdfOXBxTkVIMjVzQktzVDYxUFJXUk9rQmtCdXNjOW9FaXgxcmgtcFRsZzdBaG5wWUVjU0VsazZGRE1LY1ExOUhVVmRtTjZ2WGc2YWcwTG9VdDdoTnBj?oc=5" target="_blank">The "Ultimate Support" for Bitcoin $BT…

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin has already won 🚀 He believes BTC is now seen as digital capital, with price driven by capital flows, not cycles Banks and credit will shape its growth, while bad ideas remain the biggest risk - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5ibTlfTlRuMHBNMVJaNVB4QW55cTlZUVRCMWNjSGp1MkR4OEQtaURVQUZLRXlGVlVTUmhoeS1lcVVzZ1Y3U3MxTXZ3OVY0TDBsSWNsZ3oyUGk0MGF2WUJUZU1R?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Michael Saylor says Bi…

item.title: Bitcoin has won. Global consensus is that $BTC is digital capital. The four-year cycle is dead. Price is now driven by capital flows. Bank and digital credit will determine Bitcoin’s growth trajectory. The biggest risk is bad ideas driving iatrogenic protocol changes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE4wSEV4eWhmYmRGVFZieTI5Vm1FYUs3VVptaXdTa09DbmJ5bW9kVXhLaGJGRTFoamlaVjZWT0ZVRkN2ZjZhVkdHRTBJYTJtS2xiS1NaYmRXTldIMjg?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has won. Global consensus is that $…

item.title: Traders are the big winners as 24/7 stocks will finally end the after-hours price 'manipulation'
item.description: Round-the-clock markets promise freedom for investors and pressure for intermediaries who traditionally wielded immense power during off-hours

item.title: Nevada judge extends ban on Kalshi, rejects event contract defense
item.description: The judge said Kalshi’s event contracts are indistinguishable from sports betting, supporting the state’s position that the platform requires a gaming license.

item.title: Anthropic Spots 'Emotion Vectors' Inside Claude That Influence AI Behavior
item.description: Researchers say internal emotion-like signals shape how large language models make decisions.

item.title: Solana's quantum-threat readiness reveals harsh tradeoff: security vs speed
item.description: While Bitcoin developers scramble to find a solution and Ethereum prepares for 'Q-day,' Solana is trying to get ahead of that scenario.

item.title: Prediction markets are testing legal limits in strict Asian markets
item.description: Prediction markets are expanding into Asia’s largest economies, but unclear legal definitions and strict gambling laws may limit how far they can go.

item.title: Bitcoin shorts risk $2.5 billion liquidation at $72K: Are bears in danger?
item.description: Bitcoin is poised for a reversal if ETF demand returns or a ceasefire occurs, potentially crushing short sellers in a massive price squeeze.

item.title: Five data sources say the same thing about bitcoin market. It's thinning from the inside
item.description: CryptoQuant data shows overall bitcoin demand is contracting at -63,000 BTC per month even as institutional buyers accelerate purchases, with large holders distributing nearly 188,000 BTC over the past year.

item.title: Polymarket takes down market on missing US pilot after backlash
item.description: Polymarket cited “integrity standards” for removing the market but did not specify which rule was broken, drawing scrutiny from users who questioned how its policies are applied.

item.title: Rich Bitcoin traders lost $337M daily in first quarter of 2026
item.description: Bitcoin whales and sharks have locked in $30.9 billion in BTC losses this year, resembling the 2022 bear market, as onchain data points to continued downside risk.

item.title: Tether may delay fundraising if demand falls short at $500B valuation: Report
item.description: The $500 billion valuation would put Tether ahead of every US bank except JPMorgan Chase, surpassing Bank of America and placing it among the world’s largest financial firms.

item.title: Judge continues Nevada ban on Kalshi sports markets
item.description: A state judge ruled that Kalshi's prediction markets offering sports bets were "indistinguishable" from gambling, and extended a temporary ban in Nevada.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘no direction’ action may lead to heavier breakout: Analyst
item.description: The longer Bitcoin's price stays flat, the bigger the move up could eventually be, according to a crypto analyst.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs 'will be larger' than gold ETFs: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs offer more use cases for the average investor’s portfolio than a gold ETF does, according to ETF analyst James Seyffart.

item.title: Here's what 'cracking' bitcoin in 9 minutes by quantum computers actually means
item.description: Google's quantum paper made headlines with that number. Here's what it means, what's actually at risk, and why 6.9 million bitcoin are more exposed than the rest.

item.title: "The grand unification of AI and crypto is about to happen." — Marc Andreessen "It's now obvious that AI agents are going to need money—it's already happening." "It's that William Gibson quote: the future is already here, it just isn't distributed yet." "My friends - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE5BMTZTZTcxRjNRYlZNcTNsZEtYSFZ6U19kQnF3VldBZXdSb1drU1pKbHRrVGdhZTZXZjFqQ3BEY2RJcHRJbGx1SDREX29oMnJMUERwenVPM20?oc=5" target="_blank">"The grand unification of AI and crypto is abou…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation nearly reaches 70,000 staked ETH goal
item.description: The non-profit foundation has staked 69,500 ETH, nearly reaching the goal it unveiled at the end of February, less than two months ago.

item.title: Charles Schwab Is Gearing Up to Offer Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading
item.description: Financial giant Charles Schwab is set to launch spot buying of Bitcoin and Ethereum by the end of the quarter, the firm said Friday.

item.title: FIFA Inks World Cup Prediction Market Deal With ADI Predictstreet
item.description: The FIFA World Cup will feature a prediction market platform built on ADI Chain, with the network’s token hitting a new high Friday.

item.title: Schwab plans spot bitcoin, ether trading launch in first half of 2026
item.description: The financial services giant with almost $12 trillion in client assets is moving closer to direct crypto trading, offering subscription for early access to the Schwab Crypto account.

item.title: Circle under fire after $285 million Drift hack over inaction to freeze stolen USDC
item.description: Prominent blockchain sleuth ZachXBT alleged faster action by Circle could have limited crypto losses, but freezing asset without legal authorization carries legal risks.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Slashes 15% of Workforce After Selling $1.1 Billion in BTC
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner MARA cut 15% of its staff this week after selling $1.1 billion in Bitcoin to fuel an AI push.

item.title: Myriad Traders Predict US Boots in Iran After Downed Fighter Jet Prompts Rescue Mission
item.description: President Trump insisted that the Strait of Hormuz could easily be reopened "with a little more time."

item.title: Decentralized Email Service Dmail to Shut Down, Token Hits New Low
item.description: Dmail’s team said it struggled with infrastructure costs and failed monetization attempts despite five years of development.
